title: Lava Chicken Vanilla backport!
description: A vanilla-friendly resource pack that replaces Music Disc 13 with the Lava Chicken track, so players on older Minecraft versions can enjoy it too.
body: **Check out my other resource packs!** ## 🎶 Features Lava Chicken – Replacement for Music Disc 13 This resource pack replaces the classic Music Disc 13 with Lava Chicken, so players on older Minecraft versions can enjoy this track too! ## 🔊 Note **Other players will only hear the track if they have the same resource pack installed.** Server owners tip: you can set the resource pack to auto-load so everyone on the server can enjoy Lava Chicken together. ### Enjoy the tunes and happy Minecraft adventures!
